title: scan_block witnesses snapshot clones entire HashMap on every block
description: scanner.rs scan_block: clones both tree and witnesses at the start of every block to enable rollback on save_block_state failure. IncrementalWitness<sapling::Node, 32> serializes to ~4 KB per note. With 1000 unspent notes that is 4 MB cloned on every block (~75 seconds on mainnet). The rollback path (save_block_state failure) is a rare DB error; normal scanning always discards the snapshot. Alternative: serialize only on demand (lazy snapshot) or accept the semantic of re-scanning the block instead of holding the full snapshot. At large note counts this becomes a significant per-block allocation.
